# ClanLib NEWS - Relevant Historical Excerpt

Captured from Debian Sources on March 29, 2026.

Source:
https://sources.debian.org/src/clanlib/1.0~svn3827-2/NEWS

---

This is a focused local capture of the sections most relevant to XenoHammer's timeframe and engine context.

## Version 0.6.3 - Released August 5th 2002

- Fixed windows compile bug that sneaked into 0.6.2.

## Version 0.6.2 - Released August 2nd 2002

- DirectFB updates.
- Misc minor bug fixes.

## Version 0.6.1 - Released April 7th 2002

- endian fixes in datafilecompiler, targa & wave provider
- fixed CXX/CFLAGS not being substituted by configure
- added UPDTunnel makefile for linux
- fix for bug [537560] X11 fullscreen crash on shutdown

## Version 0.6.0 - Released April 1st 2002

- gui inbox fixed possible out-of-bounds case
- shared lib version is now 2
- png provider bugfix
- DirectSound recording support
- music playback improvements so streamed sound continues during loading

## Version 0.5.4 - January 22 2002

- Datafile & resource fixes
- Fullscreen possible under GLX
- ClanGUI memory leak fixes

## Version 0.5.3 - January 10 2002

- Default videomode is windowed, and not fullscreen

## Version 0.5.2 - January 08 2002

- Added CL_SetupVorbis
- Added CL_SetupCDAudio
- ClanSound volume fix
- Added IPv6 support for clanNetwork

## Version 0.5.1 - November 01 2001

- NetObjects example added placeholder sounds (thanks to XenoHammer project)
- PCX transparency works fine
- bugfix in ClanTTF causing crash in destruction

## Version 0.5.0 - April 28 2001

- official development release of the 0.5.x tree

## Relevance

XenoHammer was built against the older ClanLib 0.5.x/0.6.x era. These notes help anchor what the engine ecosystem looked like around the project's original development window.
